programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 10
programme.desc: Hayden, Kate and Michael have 90 minutes to cook a dish demonstrating skills acquired during the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 12
programme.desc: The final five finalists are challenged to make mushroom turnip ravioli.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Mystery Box Challenge 5
programme.desc: In a Mystery Box Challenge, the top 5 pick each other's ingredients as per the Secret Santa method.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Cooking for Loved Ones Challenge
programme.desc: The contestants cook ten servings of a single dish of their choosing for the judges.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 12
programme.desc: Guest chef Teage Ezard challenges Michael to a three course meal cook-off in the last immunity challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Worst Nightmare Challenge
programme.desc: The top 5 are surprised by George in the early morning as he shows up at the house with three guest chefs.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 12
programme.desc: Dani chooses to use her immunity pin, sending Alana into the Elimination Challenge against Ellie.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 13
programme.desc: The chefs learn the art of setting up and plating dishes at their master class.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Sunday Challenge 12
programme.desc: The contestants develop a recipe for a single dish, which will then be styled and photographed.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - EP80
programme.desc: The top four are given 135 minutes to reproduce Maggie Beer's Chook Terrine with various accompaniments.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 13
programme.desc: Contestants are given three hours to cook three dishes that reflected the story of their life.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Three Hat Challenge
programme.desc: The top three are each sent to a different establishment where they will design a dish to fit on the menu.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Pressure Test 10
programme.desc: Kate and Alana are given 4.5 hours to reproduce Adriano Zumbo's "Fairytale House" dessert.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 14
programme.desc: Each finalist get a chance to learn with a private tutor for the last masterclass.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Grand Finale
programme.desc: Kate and Michael facee off in the Grand Finale, which consists of three challenges.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - The Winner Announced
programme.desc: Kate and Michael continue to face off as the winner is finally announced.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Auditions
programme.desc: MasterChef duos competition, pairs of home cooks from around the country compete.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Little Black Forest Cakes
programme.desc: The Top 15 contestants make Little Black Forest Cakes for cookbook queen Donna Hay.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Lamb
programme.desc: The Top 14 duos face an invention test using cuts of lamb and offal.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Mystery Fridge
programme.desc: The Top 13 duos each cook a main and a dessert with the contents of 13 different fridges.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Oyster Challenge
programme.desc: The Top 12 duos shuck and prepare oysters three ways in the Bay of Islands.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Duke Of Marlborough Hotel
programme.desc: The Bottom 6 duos cook dinner for the Top 6 duos and 185 other guests at The Duke Of Marlborough Hotel.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Daniel Wilson / Kiwi Style Bouillabaisse
programme.desc: The Top 11 duos cook a Kiwi spin on a classic French fish stew for guest chef Daniel Wilson.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - 1 Fish, 2 Dish
programme.desc: The Top1 0 duos each prepare and cook two dishes from a whole fish.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - FISH
programme.desc: Masterchef judges Josh Emett and Ray McVinnie cook two simple but elegant fish dishes.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Avondale Market Team Challenge
programme.desc: The Top 9 duos split into three teams to cook and sell fast food dishes at the famous Avondale market.

programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - I'm Dancin' Here!
programme.desc: Howie Mandel’s hit game show is back with new twists and turns!

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - High Value Family
programme.desc: Howie Mandel’s hit game show is back with life-changing money on the line!

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - There's Snow Place Like Home
programme.desc: Deal Or No Deal USA

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Five Dollar Redemption
programme.desc: Deal or No Deal history collides on stage when Artis Jackson gets the chance to redeem his family’s honor.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Beard Or No Beard
programme.desc: Deal Or No Deal USA

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Happy Howie Days
programme.desc: Howie Mandel's hit game show is back after 10 years with a heart-warming holiday special.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - It Takes Two
programme.desc: Mother, teacher, and former marine Jade Thomas is all about family.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Southern Charm
programme.desc: Witness an ultimate television cliffhanger as Robert Evans fills the stage with southern charm.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Ice Cream Dreams
programme.desc: Entrepreneur, Ally Teixeira has sweet dreams that will change the face of the ice cream industry forever.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Flying High
programme.desc: Poker player Shireen Mui goes all in against The Banker.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Small Town, Big Dreams
programme.desc: Loveable Bryce Gage has big dreams for his small town, Marble Falls, TX.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - My Big Fat Greek Game Show
programme.desc: George Stathoulis and his big Greek family take over the show in a plate-breaking and suspense filled game.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Father Knows Best
programme.desc: The Motor City, Detroit, brings one-of-a-kind father of five sons, John West, to the stage.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Head Over Heels
programme.desc: Philadelphia’s Missy Silverman shakes up the stage with her boundless energy.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Sony's Choice
programme.desc: One of Deal or No Deal’s biggest fans, Sony Avalos is clear she knows how to play the game better than anyone.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Cowboy Up
programme.desc: Real life Las Vegas hero, Justin Uhart storms the stage ready to risk it all for his chance at $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Cheering For A Lucky Strike
programme.desc: Cheerleader Tex Iniguez shakes her pom poms past six figures in hopes of beating The Banker.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Classic Kiwi Dishes with a Twist
programme.desc: The Top 9 duos present their versions of a classic New Zealand main and pavlova.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Roast Lamb
programme.desc: Masterchef judges Josh Emett and Ray McVinnie cook their versions of the classic lamb roast.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Team Degustation Part 1
programme.desc: The Top 8 duos split into two teams to prepare an eight-course degustation meal.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Team Degustation Part 2
programme.desc: The Top 8 duos complete their eight-course degustation challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Josh & Simon / Degustation
programme.desc: MasterChef judges Simon Gault and Josh Emett cook two degustation-style dishes .

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Rabbit & Pasta
programme.desc: The Top 7 duos cook rabbit dishes for guest chef Ben Bayley.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Spaghetti & Meatballs
programme.desc: The bottom five duos face a cook-off for just four remaining places in the Top Six.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - MasterClass S04 #04 Josh & Ray / Pasta
programme.desc: MasterChef judges Josh Emett and Ray McVinnie cook dishes using fresh pasta.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - George Calombaris
programme.desc: The Top Six duos cook veal three ways for Australian culinary legend George Calombaris.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Burger Cook-off
programme.desc: The Top Six duos compete in a burger cook-off for some great prizes.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - MasterClass S04 #05 Josh & Simon / Veal & Venison
programme.desc: MasterChef judges Josh Emett and Simon Gault cook dishes featuring veal and venison.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Samoa / Marinated fish
programme.desc: The Top Six duos make raw fish salad on the beach at Return To Paradise resort in Samoa.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Samoa / Cooking on Fire
programme.desc: The Top Six duos cook on open fires on the beach at Return To Paradise resort in Samoa.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Josh & Simon / Samoa
programme.desc: MasterChef judges Josh Emett and Simon Gault hold a MasterClass in Samoa.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Mystery Box Risotto
programme.desc: One contestant from each of the Top Five duos faces a solo risotto challenge without their partner.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Mystery Box Dessert
programme.desc: The second contestant from each of the Top Five duos faces a solo dessert challenge without their partner.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Risotto & Dessert
programme.desc: MasterChef judges Simon Gault and Ray McVinnie make their favourite risotto and dessert.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Bali / Club Med
programme.desc: The Top Four duos tackle an Asian cuisine challenge at Club Med in Bali.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Bali / Bumbu Bali
programme.desc: The Top Four duos cook Indonesian cuisine at Bumbu Bali Cooking School.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - MasterClass S04 #08 Josh & Simon / Bali
programme.desc: MasterChef judges Josh Emett and Simon Gault cook with local ingredients in Bali.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Cookbook
programme.desc: The Top Three duos create two dishes they’d like to include in their first cookbooks.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Restaurant
programme.desc: The Top Three duos create two dishes they’d like to serve in their own restaurants.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - MasterClass S04 #09 Simon & Ray / Cookbook dishes
programme.desc: MasterChef judges Simon Gault and Ray McVinnie cook dishes from their cookbooks.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Peter Gordon
programme.desc: The Top Three duos replicate a paddle crab linguine dish by world-renowned Kiwi chef Peter Gordon.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Michel Louws
programme.desc: The Top Three duos make two intricate beef dishes by Michelin star-winning chef Michel Louws.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Simon & Ray / Favourites
programme.desc: MasterChef judges Simon Gault and Ray McVinnie cook two of their favourite dishes

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Grand Final
programme.desc: The Top Two duos face three epic challenges to decide who will win the MasterChef New Zealand title.

programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - The Bees Are So Angry
programme.desc: Five teams of two compete for $100,000 dollars on a five stunt, 2 hour spectacular.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Leeches & Shaved Heads & Tear Gas
programme.desc: In a special 2 hour Fear Factor five teams of 2 are bungeed off a cliff while tied under a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Snake Bite
programme.desc: Four couples compete for a grand prize of $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Roach Coach
programme.desc: Four teams of two compete for $50,000 as they are locked in a cage and sunk underwater.

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP11
programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Million Dollar Lane
programme.desc: Double the deals, double the drama - bowling champion Kyera presses on in her battle against The Banker.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Mile-High Millionaire
programme.desc: Flight attendant, Max Reynolds is used to high-flying adventures.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Bingo To A Million
programme.desc: Playing for his Golden Girls-style dream home, former Bingo caller Tony Oriente.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Million Dollar Musical
programme.desc: Business owner, La’Sherrie Butler Hogan showstops the stage, and the game.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Million Dollar Ironman
programme.desc: Miami police officer and Ironman competitor Jorge Montero seeks to secure his children's future.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Monopoly Money
programme.desc: Real estate agent, Toni Miller is used to buying and selling hot properties.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - The Champ Vs. The Banker
programme.desc: Michael Chandler is used to taking some hits and putting up a good fight – and tonight is no different.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Hoop Dreams
programme.desc: Single mother and marathoner Monica Durazo comes from a sales background and a family of competitors.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP39
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP32
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA Season 01 (Syndicated Version) - EP83

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP39
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP40
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Wall Street Warrior
programme.desc: Lisa Glicksman knows exactly what kind of fight is needed to beat The Banker.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Magic Touch
programme.desc: In another incredible combo game of Deal or No Deal, two new contestants fill the studio with magical moments.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Roller Coaster In Motion
programme.desc: Deal or No Deal comes to life with two Orlando contestants taking over.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Martinis for a Million
programme.desc: Laura Siano plans to save, spend and share; this game comes with martinis and male models.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Vision Quest
programme.desc: South Dakota’s Jade Delaney believes in the power of positive thinking and she has a vision board to prove it.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Looking For Luck (In All The Right Cases)
programme.desc: Nurse Andrew Shelton declares himself the unluckiest person ever to combat The Banker.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - Thanksgiving Special - Part 2
programme.desc: A restaurateur competes in a tasty Thanksgiving-themed game worth $2 million. In addition, the case models participate in various eating contests.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP9
programme.desc: Nine $1 million cases are on the line for a New Jersey woman's game.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP4
programme.desc: The Banker offers a Detroit video-game fan the chance to become a game character.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP19
programme.desc: A female drag racer from California revs up to play for the $1 million prize, as does a vivacious farmer-grandmother from Iowa.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP2
programme.desc: A mom-to-be tries to find one of five million-dollar cases, and surprises her husband.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP17
programme.desc: Tis the season for a potential million-dollar Christmas. In holiday-themed games, a family from California steps up to play, as does a newly married war hero from Oregon.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP8
programme.desc: Eight $1 million cases are added to a Minnesota woman's game.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP5
programme.desc: A pharmacy technician competes.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP7
programme.desc: Seven $1 million cases are in the mix for a male nurse from Pennsylvania.
